news.t: Roundhill Announces Name and Symbol Changes for Roundhill China Dragons ETF

holdings.infoBox: MAGC is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Roundhill China Magnificent Seven ETF (MAGC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through an actively-managed, narrow portfolio of Chinas largest and most innovative companies, termed the China Magnificent Seven. MAGC was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by Roundhill.

data.title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on China: Here's what you need to know
data.text: CNBC's Eunice Yoon joins 'Money Movers' to discuss President Trump's threat to add high Chinese tariffs, the Iran war and the failed ceasefire deal.
